description: NatWest is a UK banking brand within NatWest Group offering personal and business financial products including current accounts, savings, mortgages, and related services. Its public web presence also points developers to open banking and sandbox documentation under NatWest Group and Bank of APIs properties.
summary: NatWest exposes a public NatWest Mortgages MCP server and publicly documents open-banking developer portals, but the accessible pages reviewed did not reveal callable REST/GraphQL/CLI integration surfaces or usable machine-readable API specs on natwest.com-owned properties.
